matcher_value: $a=Get-CimInstance Win32_PhysicalMemoryArray;$m=Get-CimInstance Win32_PhysicalMemory;"ARRAY slots=$((($a|Measure-Object -Property MemoryDevices -Sum).Sum)) max={0:N2}GiB" -f ((((($a|Measure-Object -Property MaxCapacityEx -Sum).Sum)*1KB)/1GB));$m|Select-Object DeviceLocator,BankLabel,@{N='SizeGiB';E={[math]::Round($_.Capacity/1GB,2)}},Manufacturer,PartNumber,SerialNumber,ConfiguredClockSpeed,Speed,SMBIOSMemoryType,FormFactor | Format-Table -AutoSize
